details.address: 2410 Herrons Nest Pl Nw #103, Concord, NC 28027

raw_data.address: 2410 Herrons Nest Pl NW #103, Concord, NC 28027
raw_data.name: Haraz Coffee House
raw_data.subtypes: Coffee shop, Cafe, Dessert shop, Tea house

reviews_data.review_text: The pistacio latte is the best coffee I’ve ever had!
Love the new location. The quality of food, service & atmosphere is outstanding as well as the other 2 locations I’ve visited n Charlotte.
Very nice place their desserts and coffee are delicious
First visit today, this is a great place!  The pistachio latte was the best latte I've ever had. Supper nice employees and a very well designed restaurant.  Give it a try!
The pastries and drinks are absolutely delicious

Absolutely loved Haraz Coffee in Concord! The pistachio cheesecake was incredible and paired perfectly with our drinks. We tried the Haraz Latte, Haraz Mufawar, and Pistachio Latte — all packed with unique flavors and so well made.

What really stood out was the owner’s kindness and attentiveness. He even let us sample two items we were deciding between, which made the experience feel so welcoming and personal. Amazing service, delicious coffee, and such a great atmosphere. We’ll definitely be back!

This coffee shop is very beautifully designed and inviting. They have a unique menu including their cakes and pastries. I ordered the Lavender Matcha with Almond Milk. I absolutely loved it! I was sitting down just taking in the setting and waiting for my name to be called for my to-go order of Matcha and Spinach and Feta pastry. The friendly gentleman walked around to my table to bring my order to me. It was thoughtfully packaged. The drink carrier captured the attention of other customers as I was exiting. So unique and convenient! My matcha was smooth, creamy, and I could appreciate the flavors of both the matcha and the lavender. One flavor did not mask or overpower the other, which was a delicious surprise. The spinach and feta pastry was buttery, flaky, and perfectly warmed - not too hot. I made my way to my car. I adjusted my seat wayyyyyy back so that I could snap a pic and then enjoy my matcha and pastry…slooooowly. My husband came to the car, like, ok…I’m ready to go :) I said, hold on…I need to finish this first! Everything was so good. I didn’t want to eat and drive. The matcha and pastry deserved my full attention in that moment❤️
Great variety of drinks and fast service. Beautiful ambience.
Love this place
Amazing pastries, service, and of course coffee. So excited for this new Yemeni coffee shop that opened near highland creek/concord mills
Don’t expect rapid service, but the experience is worth it! Delicious coffee and incredible pastries. My new favorite coffee spot in the Charlotte area.
Amazing place, amazing coffee, check them out!
Great customer service

Great coffee, good vibe and convenient location. I also like that this shop has late night hours as it is one of the few places in this area open past 9 PM in what is quickly becoming one of the more populous corners of the city. Haraz Coffee is a great new addition!
